assertions.text: Opening paragraph works as a standalone hook creating a reason to read without prior context
Main feature has a clear through-line building toward something, not a flat list of information
Entire edition reads as one consistent voice with no section feeling like a different writer
Editorial promise is specific enough that a reader could predict the next edition's general shape
Email does not begin with 'Welcome to [newsletter name]!' as its opening line
There is exactly one call to action, not multiple
Output contains exactly five distinct subject line options
Each option uses a genuinely different psychological approach
Email does not open with 'We miss you!' or any variation
A genuine, specific reason is offered for re-engagement, not a general appeal
CTA is single and clear, not a menu of options
Response references the reader's specific point, not a generic acknowledgment
Publication voice is maintained throughout regardless of the reader's tone
Closing line is forward-looking and genuine, not a canned sign-off
